Wow, your new neighborhood looks great, Ana Paula! Is there a good place for coffee nearby?
Yes! There is a lovely bakery on the corner, right across from my building. They have amazing bread.
Perfect. And what about a pharmacy? I need to buy something for my headache.
There is one next to the supermarket, just two blocks from here. It is very convenient.
This area is so lively. Are there any parks around?
There are two. There is a small square behind the church, and a bigger park near the avenue. Let us take a stroll there.
There is a bakery on the corner of my street.
There are many shops near my building.
The pharmacy is next to the supermarket.
My neighborhood is very convenient.
Let us take a stroll around the block.

Welcome to the heart of downtown. Right now, you are standing in the main square. There is a famous landmark in front of you: the old clock tower. On the corner, across from the tower, there is a traditional bakery with wonderful bread. If you walk two blocks north, there are several museums next to the river. There is a pharmacy and a small market near the bus stop, so everything you need is very convenient. Enjoy your walk, and please use the crosswalks, because the traffic here can be busy.

Hi Ana Paula, it is Sarah. I am downtown right now, very close to your neighborhood. Let us meet for lunch! There is a lovely cafe on the corner of Fifth Avenue, right across from the big square. It is next to the pharmacy, just behind the old church. There is a lot of traffic today, so take the crosswalk near the landmark and walk one block. See you soon. Bye!

Welcome the guest and say where you live. Say what there is on your street or corner. Describe the shops and places near your home. Explain why the location is so convenient. Invite the guest to take a stroll around the block.
